{{CargoRelic
|name=Nishijin Fabric
|class_id=22147
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=12-19
|source=
|description=On Dec 19, 1467 AD, Nishijin Fabric became exclusive to the royal family.<br>Nishijin Fabric is a traditional craft originating from the Nishijin area of Japan. The fabrics are first dyed and then hand-woven by highly-skilled artisans for more than twenty different processes. Although output is low, the quality of the fabric is considered top-notch in the textile industry.
|fame=37
|art=73
|fth=48
|civ=47
|tech=38
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Quantum Amp production +1.8%
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Quantum Amp production +2.4%
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Quantum Amp production +3%
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Quantum Amp production +4.2%
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Quantum Amp production +5.4%
|ss7=Snail ATK +90<br>Quantum Amp production +5.4%<br>Quantum Amp production +4.2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: This Relic's ART +10
|skill2=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Demon Cells gained +15%
}}
